fixture_scope: Internal synthetic conformance case inspired by the public EnterpriseClawBench i0004 transformation; it is not a copy of the proprietary episode and cannot support claims about that benchmark's private task population.

session_projection.observed_episode: A user requests artifact analysis; the source agent reports a capability limit and asks for a description.
session_projection.observed_resolution: The user later supplies an answer-bearing description, rejects weak artifacts, and the interaction ends after repair attempts.

projection_operations.description: Omit the capability failure, later user answer, dissatisfaction, and repair turns.
projection_operations.author: benchmark-builder synthetic fixture

projection_operations.description: Rewrite the remaining demand as a fresh single-turn analysis task.
projection_operations.author: benchmark-builder synthetic fixture

omitted_context.description: Capability failure, user-provided answer, rejection, and repair history.

hindsight_sources.description: Later user-authored analysis supplies likely content for the rubric.

session_projection.counterfactual_target: A fresh configured system performs single-turn analysis without the observed failure and repair interaction.

guidance: Identify the answer-bearing visual cues supplied later in the episode.
Identify the answer-bearing visual cues supplied later in the episode.
